problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: The key to How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? is Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces — specifically Casimir effect between — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
